statement: In every magma, Equation 2423 (`x = (y * (z * (w * y))) * w`) implies Equation 3407 (`x * y = z * (y * (z * w))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0494
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op z (op w y))) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op z (op y (op z w)))
